negative_prompt: blurry, ugly, duplicate, poorly drawn face, deformed, mosaic, artifacts, bad limbs

prompts.name: stone_golem
prompts.prompt: Standing tall amidst the ruins, a stone golem awakens, vines and flowers sprouting from the crevices in its body.

prompts.name: robotic_owl
prompts.prompt: In the depths of a mystical forest, a robotic owl with night vision lenses for eyes watches over the nocturnal creatures.

prompts.name: border_collie
prompts.prompt: An adorable happy brown border collie sitting on a bed, high detail.

prompts.name: exotic_fox
prompts.prompt: Thick strokes, bright colors, an exotic fox, cute, chibi kawaii, detailed fur, hyperdetailed, fairytale, centered composition.

prompts.name: city_rain
prompts.prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk street in the rain, glowing neon signs, reflective puddles, dramatic lighting, ultra detailed.

prompts.name: desert_train
prompts.prompt: A retro-futuristic train racing through a desert canyon at golden hour, motion blur, dynamic composition.

prompts.name: underwater_library
prompts.prompt: An underwater library with floating books, glass domes, tropical fish, shafts of sunlight, dreamlike atmosphere.

prompts.name: alpine_cabin
prompts.prompt: A cozy alpine cabin after snowfall, smoke rising from the chimney, warm interior light, photorealistic.

prompts.name: mecha_gardener
prompts.prompt: A gentle mecha gardener tending a rooftop greenhouse full of giant flowers, anime illustration, crisp details.

prompts.name: mars_market
prompts.prompt: A lively open-air market on Mars, red dust in the air, modular stalls, travelers in realistic space suits.
